title: Rename device - Rename, non English language
scenario: Device name with non-English characters does not display correctly across Home screen, Device Settings, Find My Device, and Support pages
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name displayed above the device settings area.
In the rename input field, enter a device name containing non-English characters (e.g., Chinese, Japanese, Arabic, Cyrillic, or accented Latin characters).
Observe the input field to verify the non-English characters are displayed correctly.
Navigate back to the Home screen and check that the new name appears correctly above the device settings.
Go to App Settings → Find My Device and verify the new name is displayed correctly.
Go to Support → Device page and verify the new name is displayed correctly.
expected: The device name with non-English characters is displayed correctly in all locations: the rename input field, above device settings on the Home screen, in App Settings > Find My Device, and on the Support > Device page.
